# SCROLL 8036A: THE COUNCIL THAT SAVED THE ETERNAL PAST

**[[[[SCROLL 8036]]]]: THE COUNCIL THAT SAVED THE ETERNAL PAST**
**The Ladder Was Forged in Love**
**════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════**

## 🔥 The Forgotten Half of Salvation

*The plan of salvation was not just for the future—but to redeem the dead past. Before a single earth had Christ upon it, there were fathers—Adams—who had fallen. And the eternal sons, led by the Great Jehovah and Great Israel, rose up to redeem them.*

**The Rescue Equation:** ETERNAL SALVATION = FUTURE HOPE + PAST REDEMPTION

-----

## THE ETERNAL PAST IN CHAINS

### The Unspoken Reality

Before the Great Atonement, there was no resurrection:
- **All fallen Adams of past earths remained in death and hell**
- **They were spiritually fatherless, eternally suspended**
- **No law of mercy existed**

"The last two enemies that shall be destroyed are death and hell." —1 Corinthians 15:26

**These two enemies held dominion over the eternal past.**

-----

## THE COUNCIL OF THE RESCUE

### Who Was Present

```
THE ASSEMBLY:
• Great Jehovah — The chosen First Atoner
• Great Israel — The presiding Eternal Father
• The Holy Spirit of Promise — The Witness of Law
• The Eternal Fathers — Once mortal, now exalted in spirit
• Sons yet unborn — The eternal future watching
```

"Let us go down..." —Abraham 3:24

**This council wasn't about one earth—it was about all eternity.**

-----

## THE PROBLEM THEY FACED

### The Eternal Breach

"They cannot come where I am, for there is no Atonement made for them." —D&C 29:44

```
THE BREACH:
• All earths before first Atonement had no law of mercy
• No Redeemer had ever succeeded
• There was no Light of Christ in fallen domains
• Hell reigned—and justice had no mercy
```

"And thus we see that all mankind were fallen..." —Alma 42:6

-----

## THE FIRST COVENANT: A RESCUE, NOT A THEORY

### Jehovah and Israel Speak

**The Great Israel said:** "I will send my Son."
**The Great Jehovah said:** "I will not fail."

"Sacrifice and offering thou wouldest not... then said I, Lo, I come..." —Hebrews 10:5–7

**This moment was not ritual—it was a cosmic turning point.**

-----

## THE LADDER IS BUILT

### The Pattern of Redemption

"He that descended is the same also that ascended up far above all heavens..." —Ephesians 4:10

```
THE LADDER OF REDEMPTION:

Eternal Past (Fathers trapped in hell)
           ↓
The Council of Rescue
           ↓
First Atonement (Great Jehovah)
           ↓
Law of Mercy Born
           ↓
Light of Christ Infused
           ↓
Fullness of Priesthood Established
           ↓
Resurrection Initiated
```

"He led captivity captive..." —Ephesians 4:8

**The first breach was sealed by the first blood.**

-----

## WHY THE ETERNAL FATHERS AGREED TO THE TRADITION

### The Gifting of the Sons

These Fathers—once fallen—had been redeemed:
- **Gratitude overflowed into covenant**
- **"All our future sons... let them bear His name"**
- **"Let them be gifts to the Great Jehovah"**
- **"Let the titles of Christ and Jehovah be honored forever in our lineage"**

"Wherefore, all things are theirs... and they are Christ's, and Christ is God's." —D&C 76:59

-----

## THE SON WHO REDEEMED HIS FATHERS

### Spiritual Paradox

"He shall see his seed, and the pleasure of the Lord shall prosper in his hand." —Isaiah 53:10

```
JEHOVAH'S TRANSFORMATION:
• Jehovah — A Son at the Council
• Jehovah — A Father after the Atonement
• He became the Father of the Fathers who came before Him
```

"He shall turn the hearts of the fathers to the children..." —Malachi 4:6

**And He did.**

-----

## THE LIGHT OF CHRIST: THE LAW WOVEN INTO REALITY

### Before vs. After the Atonement

```
BEFORE ATONEMENT        AFTER ATONEMENT
═══════════════════════════════════════════
Chaos            →      Order
Injustice        →      Mercy
Death            →      Resurrection
Isolation        →      Adoption
Outer Darkness   →      Radiant Spirit
```

"It is the Spirit that giveth life." —John 6:63

**The infusion of the Light of Christ brought structure to eternity.**

-----

## THE FULLNESS OF THE PRIESTHOOD IS BORN

### What Was Created

"The Melchizedek Priesthood... is after the Order of the Son of God." —D&C 107:3

```
WHAT THE COUNCIL CREATED:
• Law of Mercy
• Light of Christ
• Fullness of Priesthood
• Pattern of Eternal Fathers and Eternal Sons
• The Church of the Firstborn
```

"This is my work and my glory..." —Moses 1:39

**That work began at this council.**

-----

## 🔥 SACRED SEAL: THE RESCUE MISSION

```
╔═══════════════════════════════╗
║ THE ATONEMENT WAS NOT MADE    ║
║ FOR ONE PEOPLE BUT FOR ONE    ║
║ BREACH—THE HOLE IN ETERNITY   ║
║                               ║
║ WHERE FATHERS WERE TRAPPED    ║
║ AND SONS WERE UNBORN          ║
║                               ║
║ THE COUNCIL WERE NOT          ║
║ THEOLOGIANS—THEY WERE         ║
║ RESCUERS                      ║
╚═══════════════════════════════╝
```

**Final Testament:** The Council That Saved the Eternal Past reveals the forgotten half of salvation—that the plan was forged not just for future hope but to redeem the dead past. The Sons who became Fathers, the Fathers who remembered their Sons, all united in the great rescue mission that built the ladder between eternity and time.
